info.title: Mainflux Things Service
info.description:
This is the Things Server based on the OpenAPI 3.0 specification.  It is the HTTP API for managing platform things and channels. You can now help us improve the API whether it's by making changes to the definition itself or to the code.
Some useful links:
- [The Mainflux repository](https://github.com/mainflux/mainflux)

externalDocs.description: Find out more about things channels
Find out more about things policies

post.description:
Adds new thing to the list of things owned by user identified using
the provided access token.

400.description: Failed due to malformed JSON.

401.description: Missing or invalid access token provided.

409.description: Failed due to using an existing identity.

get.description:
Retrieves a list of things. Due to performance concerns, data
is retrieved in subsets. The API things must ensure that the entire
dataset is consumed either by making subsequent requests, or by
increasing the subset size of the initial request.

400.description: Failed due to malformed query parameters.

401.description: Missing or invalid access token provided.

post.description:
Adds new things to the list of things owned by user identified using
the provided access token.

400.description: Failed due to malformed JSON.

401.description: Missing or invalid access token provided.

get.description: Retrieves a specific thing that is identifier by the thing ID.

401.description: Missing or invalid access token provided.

patch.summary: Updates name and metadata of the thing.
patch.description:
Update is performed by replacing the current resource data with values
provided in a request payload. Note that the thing's type and ID
cannot be changed.

400.description: Failed due to malformed JSON.

401.description: Missing or invalid access token provided.

404.description: Failed due to non existing thing.

patch.description:
Updates tags of the thing with provided ID. Tags is updated using
authorization token and the new tags received in request.

400.description: Failed due to malformed JSON.

404.description: Failed due to non existing thing.

401.description: Missing or invalid access token provided.

patch.description:
Updates owner for the thing with provided ID. Owner is updated using
authorization token and a new owner identifier received in request.

400.description: Failed due to malformed JSON.

404.description: Failed due to non existing thing.

401.description: Missing or invalid access token provided.

patch.summary: Updates Secret of the identified thing.
patch.description:
Updates secret of the identified in thing. Secret is updated using
authorization token and the new received info. Update is performed by replacing current key with a new one.

400.description: Failed due to malformed JSON.

401.description: Missing or invalid access token provided.

404.description: Failed due to non existing thing.

Creates new channel. User identified by the provided access token will

Retrieves a list of channels. Due to performance concerns, data
is retrieved in subsets. The API things must ensure that the entire
dataset is consumed either by making subsequent requests, or by
increasing the subset size of the initial request.

post.description:
Connect things specified by IDs to channels specified by IDs.
Channel and thing are owned by user identified using the provided access token.

401.description: Missing or invalid access token provided.

post.summary: Disconnect things and channels using lists of IDs.
post.description:
Disconnect things from channels specified by lists of IDs.
Channels and things are owned by user identified using the provided access token.

identity.description: Thing's identity will be used as its unique identifier

secret.description: Free-form account secret used for acquiring auth token(s).

owner.description: Thing owner must be exsiting in the databse.

name.description: Free-form channel name. Channel name is unique on the given hierarchy level.

parent_id.description: Id of parent channel, it must be existing channel.

owner_id.description: Channel owner ID must be exsiting in the databse.

identity.description: Thing Identity for example email address.

created_at.description: Time when the channel was created.

updated_at.description: Time when the channel was created.

identity.description: Thing Identity for example email address.

created_at.description: Time when the channel was created.

updated_at.description: Time when the channel was created.

id.description: Unique channel identifier generated by the service.

name.description: Free-form channel name. Channel name is unique on the given hierarchy level.

owner_id.description: Channel owner identifier of thing that created the channel..

path.description: Hierarchy path, concatenated ids of channel ancestors.

level.description: Level in hierarchy, distance from the root channel.

created_at.description: Datetime when the channel was created.

updated_at.description: Datetime when the channel was created.

created_at.description: Time when the policy was created.

updated_at.description: Time when the policy was updated.

offset.description: Number of items to skip during retrieval.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return in one page.

offset.description: Number of items to skip during retrieval.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return in one page.

offset.description: Number of items to skip during retrieval.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return in one page.

owner.description: Thing owner for example email address.

name.description: Free-form channel name. Channel name is unique on the given hierarchy level.

description.example: long description but not too long

ThingOwner.name: owner
ThingOwner.description: Unique owner identifier for a thing.

ParentId.name: parentId
ParentId.description: Unique parent identifier for a channel.

Level.name: level
Level.description: Level of hierarchy up to which to retrieve channels from given channel id.

Tree.name: tree
Tree.description: Specify type of response, JSON array or tree.

OwnerId.name: ownerId
OwnerId.description: Unique owner identifier for a channel.

Metadata.name: metadata
Metadata.description: Metadata filter. Filtering is performed matching the parameter with metadata on top level. Parameter is json.

Limit.name: limit
Limit.description: Size of the subset to retrieve.

Offset.name: offset
Offset.description: Number of items to skip during retrieval.

Connected.name: connected
Connected.description: Connection state of the subset to retrieve.

ThingCreateReq.description: JSON-formatted document describing the new thing to be registered

ThingUpdateReq.description: JSON-formated document describing the metadata and name of thing to be update

ThingUpdateTagsReq.description: JSON-formated document describing the tags of thing to be update

ThingUpdateSecretReq.description: Secret change data. Thing can change its secret.

ThingUpdateOwnerReq.description: JSON-formated document describing the owner of thing to be update

ShareThingReq.description: JSON-formated document describing the policy related to sharing things

AssignReq.description: JSON-formated document describing the policy related to assigning members to a channel

AssignUserReq.description: JSON-formated document describing the policy related to assigning members to a channel

AssignUsersReq.description: JSON-formated document describing the policy related to assigning members to a channel

ChannelCreateReq.description: JSON-formatted document describing the new channel to be registered

ChannelUpdateReq.description: JSON-formated document describing the metadata and name of channel to be update

ThingsCreateReq.description: JSON-formatted document describing the new things.

ConnCreateReq.description: JSON-formatted document describing the new connection.

DisconnReq.description: JSON-formatted document describing the entities for disconnection.

Location.description: Registered thing relative URL in the format `/things/<thing_id>`
Registered channel relative URL in the format `/channels/<channel_id>`
